description_long: This is a modern bed with a simple, rectangular frame and a tall, padded headboard featuring three subtle button accents. The bed sits low to the ground on short, sturdy legs, giving it a contemporary and minimalistic appearance. The mattress is clearly visible and appears to be covered with a fitted sheet, with no additional bedding or decorative pillows present. The frame and headboard are upholstered in a uniform, light gray fabric, contributing to a clean and neutral aesthetic. The foot of the bed is open, with no footboard, allowing easy access from the end. The overall design is functional and streamlined, suitable for urban apartments or minimalist interiors.
description: A modern, low-profile bed with a padded gray headboard and visible mattress, featuring a simple and minimalistic design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the padded headboard with button accents and the full width of the mattress.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thickness of the mattress and the height of the headboard relative to the frame.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain back of the headboard and the absence of a footboard.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the same features as view 1, with the headboard and mattress profile visible.
